meanings.definition: come down on or keep down by unjust use of one's authority
to compress with violence, out of natural shape or condition
come out better in a competition, race, or conflict
examples: Agassi beat Becker in the tennis championship
Harvard defeated Yale in the last football game
She was crushed by his refusal of her invitation
The death of her son smashed her
Martin Luther King tried to break down racial discrimination

meanings.definition: become injured, broken, or distorted by pressure
examples: The plastic bottle crushed against the wall

meanings.definition: treated so as to have a permanently wrinkled appearance
subdued or brought low in condition or status
